zh.auth.unauthorized: 你没有权限使用该机器人: {user_id}
zh.message.sessions_cleared: 已清理所有用户的所有会话数据。
zh.message.restart_requested: 正在重启机器人进程，稍后会自动回来。
zh.message.stop_result: 已终止 {task_count} 个任务，停止 {process_count} 个 CLI 进程。
zh.message.stop_none: 当前没有正在执行的任务。
zh.message.project_switched:
已切换项目到: `{path}`
当前会话已重置: `{session_id}`
后续消息会在新项目上下文中处理。
zh.message.timeout: CLI 请求超时，请稍后重试
zh.message.stopped_by_stop: 当前任务已被 /stop 终止。
zh.message.session_created_and_switched: 已创建并切换到新会话 `{session_id}`
zh.help.intro: 这是 Telegram -> CLI 的会话入口。
zh.help.body: 直接发送文本即可与当前 CLI 对话，当前 session 的上下文会持续保留。
zh.help.action.status: - `/status` 查看运行状态、已运行时间、session 细节与 token 用量
zh.help.action.new_session: - `/session_new` 新建会话，把不同任务隔离开
zh.help.action.session_details: - `/session_details` 查看全部会话详情，配合 `/session_switch <session_id>` 切换
zh.help.action.project: - `/project` 切项目路径，`/files` 查看目录内容
zh.help.action.file_browser: - 文件浏览按钮可直接浏览目录；关闭时会显示开启指引
zh.help.action.cli: - help 面板中可直接切换 `Codex` 和 `Google Antigravity`
zh.help.action.stop: - `/stop` 终止所有正在执行的 CLI 任务
zh.status.title: 当前机器人状态如下。
zh.status.bound_sessions: - 当前 CLI 已绑定线程: `{count}`
zh.token.not_configured_full:
当前未配置 `openai_admin_api_key`，无法查询组织级 token 用量。

说明:
- OpenAI/Codex 没有公开的“token 余额”接口
- 这里只能查询组织或项目维度的 usage/costs
- 如果本地 Codex CLI 账号和这个 admin key 不属于同一计费范围，结果不会完全对应
zh.token.query_failed: 查询 token 用量失败: {error_type}: {error}
zh.token.summary:
未发现公开的 token 余额接口，以下为可查询到的组织级用量汇总。

统计时间: `{date}`
统计范围: `{scope}`

今日 token:
- 输入: `{today_input}`
- 输出: `{today_output}`
- 合计: `{today_total}`

近 30 天:
- 输入: `{month_input}`
- 输出: `{month_output}`
- 合计: `{month_total}`
- 花费: `{cost}`
zh.files.title: 文件浏览
zh.files.disabled.title: 文件浏览功能未开启
zh.files.disabled.body:
当前配置默认关闭该功能。

开启方法:
1. 打开 `settings/bot_config.json`
2. 将 `file_browser_enabled` 改为 `true`
3. 由你手动重启 bot 进程使配置生效

出于安全考虑，Codex 不会替你重启进程。
zh.files.root_missing:
当前项目目录不存在，无法打开文件浏览:
`{path}`
zh.files.path_missing:
目标路径不存在，可能已经被移动或删除:
`{path}`
zh.files.dir.summary:
📂 当前位置:
`{path}`

项目起点:
`{project_path}`

第 `{page}` / `{total_pages}` 页，共 `{count}` 项。
zh.files.dir.empty:
📂 当前位置:
`{path}`

目录为空。
zh.files.dir.truncated: 当前目录项目较多，请使用翻页按钮继续浏览。
zh.files.file.truncated: [内容已截断，已尽量展示更多字符以避免超过 Telegram 限制]
zh.files.file.binary: [二进制或不可安全预览的文件，无法直接展示文本内容]
zh.files.invalid_target: 这个浏览按钮已失效，请重新打开文件浏览。
zh.project.selector.summary:
📁 项目选择器

当前项目:
`{current_path}`

浏览位置:
`{path}`

第 `{page}` / `{total_pages}` 页，共 `{count}` 个目录。

点击目录进入，点击“选择当前目录”立即切换项目。
zh.project.selector.empty:
📁 项目选择器

当前项目:
`{current_path}`

浏览位置:
`{path}`

当前目录下没有可选子目录。
zh.project.invalid_target: 这个项目选择按钮已失效，请重新打开 `/project`。
zh.tool.edit.completed: 已完成 {files} 个文件的修改
zh.tool.edit.summary: 已改动 {files} 个文件，+{added} / -{removed} 行

en.auth.unauthorized: You are not allowed to use this bot: {user_id}
en.message.sessions_cleared: Cleared all session data for all users.
en.message.restart_requested: Restarting the bot process. It will come back shortly.
en.message.stop_none: There are no running tasks right now.
en.message.project_not_dir: Project path is not a directory: `{path}`
en.message.project_switched:
Switched project to: `{path}`
Current session reset: `{session_id}`
Future messages will use the new project context.
en.message.processing: The active CLI is working on it. Please wait...
en.message.timeout: The active CLI request timed out. Please try again later.
en.message.stopped_by_stop: The current task was stopped by /stop.
en.message.session_created_and_switched: Created and switched to new session `{session_id}`
en.help.intro: This is the Telegram -> CLI entry point.
en.help.body: Send text directly to chat with the active CLI. The current session context is preserved.
en.help.action.status: - `/status` shows runtime state, uptime, session details, and token usage
en.help.action.new_session: - `/session_new` creates a new session to isolate a task
en.help.action.session_details: - `/session_details` shows all sessions, then use `/session_switch <session_id>` to switch
en.help.action.project: - `/project` switches the project path, `/files` lists directory contents
en.help.action.file_browser: - The file browser button opens an interactive directory view; when disabled it shows enable instructions
en.help.action.cli: - The help panel can switch between `Codex` and `Google Antigravity`
en.status.title: Current bot status:
en.token.not_configured_full:
No `openai_admin_api_key` is configured, so organization-level token usage cannot be queried.

Notes:
- OpenAI/Codex does not expose a public token balance API
- Only organization/project usage and costs can be queried here
- If the local Codex CLI account and this admin key are not billed under the same scope, the numbers will not fully match
en.token.summary:
There is no public token balance API. Below is the organization-level usage summary that can be queried.

Date: `{date}`
Scope: `{scope}`

Today:
- Input: `{today_input}`
- Output: `{today_output}`
- Total: `{today_total}`

Last 30 days:
- Input: `{month_input}`
- Output: `{month_output}`
- Total: `{month_total}`
- Cost: `{cost}`
en.files.title: File browser
en.files.disabled.title: File browser is disabled
en.files.disabled.body:
This feature is off by default.

To enable it:
1. Open `settings/bot_config.json`
2. Change `file_browser_enabled` to `true`
3. Restart the bot process yourself so the new config is loaded

For safety, Codex will not restart the process for you.
en.files.root_missing:
The current project directory does not exist, so the file browser cannot open:
`{path}`
en.files.path_missing:
The target path no longer exists:
`{path}`
en.files.dir.summary:
📂 Current path:
`{path}`

Project start:
`{project_path}`

Page `{page}` / `{total_pages}`, `{count}` item(s) total.
en.files.dir.empty:
📂 Current path:
`{path}`

This directory is empty.
en.files.dir.truncated: This directory has more items. Use the paging buttons to continue browsing.
en.files.file.truncated: [content truncated to stay within Telegram limits]
en.files.file.binary: [Binary or non-previewable file; text preview is unavailable]
en.files.invalid_target: This browser button has expired. Reopen the file browser.

📁 Project selector

Open a directory to continue, or tap "Select current directory" to switch immediately.
